calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Tito Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff McCormack Baron Ragan Management Services, Inc.
No appearance by defendant Christopher Moore.
Default was entered against defendant on June 15, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on August 10, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, and against the Defaulted Defendant Christopher Moore as follows:

Defendant Christopher Moore is enjoined and restrained from being within 150 yards or any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, perpetually pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 526.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2010 Off Calendar
